nodes.id: Auditor / Tech Lead: Identifies impact and defines folder structure/scaffolding.
Documentation (Planning Phase): Drafts User Stories and Acceptance Criteria before execution begins.
DevOps & SecOps: Manages CI/CD, pre-commit hooks, environment compatibility, pipeline security enforcement.
Execution (Dev): Follow audit plan and User Stories strictly. Writes Tests BEFO0RE Code.
Gatekeeper (QA/Red Team): Audit UI/UX and tests before any PR attempt to break the UI based on Acceptance Criteria.
Documentation (Release Phase): Maintains ADRs, updates i18n keys ensuring Portuguese technical documentation. Injects/indexes new decisions into the local RAG vector database.
